message:
chore(qa): extend exception policy review dates from 2026-03-31 to 2026-06-30

The Q1 2026 review deadline has passed and the tracked extension
remediation items (runtime shim mismatches, missing npm packages,
manifest command-set divergences) remain open. Extending the review_by
dates to end of Q2 2026 to reflect the updated timeline for resolving
these known failures.

Affects 27 entries in extension_remediation_backlog.json and 3 entries
in the qa_certification_dossier test fixture, all under tracking issues
bd-k5q5.3.9 and bd-k5q5.2.7.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
